title: useMeasureScrollbar
description: Measures the scrollbar size (width/height), useful for layout adjustments in scrollable containers.
summary: Measures scrollbar dimensions for adaptive layout handling.

body.raw:
## Usage

Basic usage example to quickly see how the `useMeasureScrollbar` works.

<UseMeasureScrollbarDemosUsage />

## API

| API       | Type    | Default           | Annotation                                        |
| --------- | ------- | ----------------- | ------------------------------------------------- |
| render`?` | boolean | `false`           | state action isOpen value                         |
| has`?`    | boolean | `{ has: true }`   | set attributes `data-has-scroll` for some element |
| modal`?`  | boolean | `{ modal: true }` | remove scroll bar when `isOpen = true`            |

---

## Source Codes

Full working code example, including necessary markup and styles.
You can copy and paste this code directly to start using the component immediately.

<SourceCodes name="use-measure-scrollbar" />

`,(0,r.jsx)(n,{name:"use-measure-scrollbar",code:`"use client";\r
import { useEffect, useState } from "react";\r
\r
interface Options {\r
  modal?: boolean;\r
}\r
\r
export function useMeasureScrollbar(render: boolean = false, options: Options = {}): [boolean, number] {\r
  const { modal = true } = options;\r
\r
  const [hasScrollbar, setHasScrollbar] = useState<boolean>(true);\r
  const [scrollbarWidth, setScrollbarWidth] = useState<number>(0);\r
\r
  useEffect(() => {\r
    const measureScrollbar = () => {\r
      const outer = document.createElement("div");\r
      outer.style.visibility = "hidden";\r
      outer.style.position = "absolute";\r
      outer.style.zIndex = "-9999px";\r
      outer.style.overflow = "scroll";\r
\r
      document.body.appendChild(outer);\r
      const width = outer.offsetWidth - outer.clientWidth;\r
      document.body.removeChild(outer);\r
      setScrollbarWidth(width);\r
      setHasScrollbar(width > 0);\r
    };\r
\r
    measureScrollbar();\r
    window.addEventListener("resize", measureScrollbar);\r
    return () => {\r
      window.removeEventListener("resize", measureScrollbar);\r
    };\r
  }, []);\r
\r
  useEffect(() => {\r
    const timeoutId: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;\r
\r
    if (render) {\r
      if (modal) {\r
        attachBodyProperty(scrollbarWidth);\r
        applyStateEffect(true);\r
      }\r
    } else {\r
      if (modal) {\r
        detachBodyProperty();\r
        applyStateEffect(false);\r
      }\r
    }\r
\r
    return () => {\r
      if (timeoutId) {\r
        clearTimeout(timeoutId);\r
      }\r
      if (modal) {\r
        detachBodyProperty();\r
        applyStateEffect(false);\r
      }\r
    };\r
  }, [render, modal, scrollbarWidth]);\r
\r
  return [hasScrollbar, scrollbarWidth] as const;\r
}\r
\r
export function attachBodyProperty(scrollbarWidth: number) {\r
  const body = document.body;\r
  body.setAttribute("data-has-scroll", "true");\r
  body.style.setProperty("overflow", "hidden");\r
  body.style.setProperty("margin-right", "var(--set-has-scrollbar, var(--has-scrollbar))");\r
  body.style.setProperty("--has-scrollbar", \`\${scrollbarWidth}px\`);\r
}\r
\r
export function detachBodyProperty() {\r
  const body = document.body;\r
  body.removeAttribute("data-has-scroll");\r
  body.style.removeProperty("overflow");\r
  body.style.removeProperty("margin-right");\r
  body.style.removeProperty("--has-scrollbar");\r
}\r
\r
type State = "opened" | "open" | "closed";\r
\r
export function attributeState(element: HTMLElement, state: State) {\r
  element.setAttribute("data-state", state as string);\r
}\r
\r
export function applyStateEffect(apply: boolean) {\r
  const elements = document.querySelectorAll("[data-has-scroll]");\r
\r
  elements.forEach((element: Element) => {\r
    if (element instanceof HTMLElement) {\r
      if (apply) {\r
        element.style.marginRight = "var(--set-has-scrollbar, var(--has-scrollbar))";\r
      } else {\r
        element.style.removeProperty("margin-right");\r
      }\r
    }\r
  });\r
}`,ext:".ts",repo:"web/hooks/use-measure-scrollbar.ts"})]})}function u(t={}){let{wrapper:e}=t.components||{};return e?(0,r.jsx)(e,{...t,children:(0,r.jsx)(d,{...t})}):d(t)}function h(t,e){throw new Error("Expected "+(e?"component":"object")+" `"+t+"` to be defined: you likely forgot to import, pass, or provide it.")}return x(S);})();
